Architecture

How Cognitive OS turns raw input into signal, direction, and action

Current Phase
Execution

Architecture Patterns

Capture

Receives raw life input into the system.

Click to explore

Inbox / Router

Classifies and routes incoming input into the correct destination.

Click to explore

Memory

Stores raw captures, processed notes, projects, event logs, and history.

Click to explore

Signals

Detects recurring ideas, clusters, momentum, and meaningful patterns.

Click to explore

Drift

Compares intended goals vs recent behavior and attention.

Click to explore

AI Reasoning

Explains what the system detects in natural language.

Click to explore

Action Engine

Converts insight into recommended next steps.

Click to explore

Dashboard / Chat / UI

Displays state, signals, actions, and AI explanations.

Click to explore

Feedback + Event Log

Logs accepted, rejected, and completed actions and loops them back into memory.

Click to explore
System Loop:
CaptureUnderstandDetectExplainActLearn
